title: Security Operations Specialist
notes: Entry-level security operations on internal IT team - Phishing threat detection, alert triage, incident response - SIEM knowledge preferred not required - BS in IT/Cyber required - Onsite Reston HQ - Strong fit for new grad with Security+

title: Tier 1 SOC Analyst - Remote
notes: 100 percent remote 24x7 SOC - Security+ satisfies cert requirement - Classroom SIEM experience accepted (Splunk, QRadar, Sentinel) - Night shifts - Equipment provided plus sponsored training - No clearance needed

title: Helpdesk Specialist - Entry Level
notes: Explicitly entry-level at strong $30/hr - DC government client work - O365 and Active Directory account management - No clearance listed - Easy apply on Indeed

title: Associate SOC Analyst
notes: Associate-level SOC at Maryland-headquartered managed security firm - Monitor, investigate, and root-cause security incidents - Security+ aligns well - Remote - No clearance required

title: Customer Support Specialist (Help Desk) - CMS NPPES
notes: CMS NPPES help desk for healthcare providers - 0-1 yrs experience accepted - Fully remote M-F 8:30-5:30 EST - Federal contractor experience builder - CMS vetting after offer

title: Technical Operations Specialist
notes: Training plus technical operations role - Technical problem solving, database management, report building - BS required, no experience minimum - Onsite Reston HQ - Foot in the door at fast-growing govtech firm

title: Junior Help Desk Agent
notes: Tier 1 support for DoD customer at NAS Pax River - 4-week paid onsite training program - Very entry-level friendly - Public trust eligibility sufficient, active clearance only preferred

title: Help Desk Support Technician / Junior SaaS Solutions Engineer
notes: Corporate IT team at federal contractor HQ - No clearance required - Windows support and hardware provisioning - 1 yr help desk preferred - Top Workplaces winner

title: Service Desk Level 1 Analyst
notes: National MSP - Remote 1st shift 7:30a-4p CST M-F - 1-2 yrs tech support preferred but invests in certs and career paths - Phone, email, chat, ticket support - Good MSP springboard role

title: Tier 1 Helpdesk Technician
notes: Supports FDA White Oak campus 24/7 service desk - ServiceNow ticketing - Must be able to obtain Public Trust - Good federal contracting foot in the door but lower pay

title: Technical Support Specialist - US Remote
notes: Healthcare IT clinical communications vendor - 24/7 support team hiring night shifts - Paid daytime training first 60 days - Remote-first with benefits day one - Entry friendly with advancement track

title: IT Support Specialist - Onsite
notes: Nonprofit, no clearance needed - Help desk plus Active Directory and O365 admin, imaging and deployment - Certs recommended not required - M-F onsite - Tuition reimbursement

title: Help Desk Agent - Day (Enterprise AI Support)
notes: 24x7 enterprise AI support desk onsite San Antonio - 1 yr help desk or customer support experience - Security+ exceeds the IAT I cert requirement - Must be ELIGIBLE for Secret clearance, no active clearance needed

title: IT Support Technician - Level 1
notes: True entry level - Prior IT experience or A+ preferred but NOT required - Onsite contract in Austin metro with local travel - Desktops, laptops, printers, mobile, onboarding, asset inventory

title: Technical Support Representative Level I
notes: Supports electronic access control systems - Metro accessible near Bethesda station - No clearance - Full benefits including 401k - Easy apply on Indeed

title: Tier I Service Desk Analyst
notes: Supports Library of Congress - Hybrid schedule with weekend 12-hr shifts - A+ certification required (Security+ exceeds it but confirm with recruiter) - Public trust obtainable - Repeat Top Workplaces winner

title: IT Support Specialist (Level 1) / Help Desk Analyst
notes: Level 1 first-line support, hybrid in Houston - Troubleshoot desktops, laptops, mobile devices - Log tickets in ITSM - Contract with W2 available - Pay depends on experience

title: Desk Side Engineer - Junior
notes: Junior title but asks 2 yrs onsite support experience - Evening shift onsite - Must be able to obtain Public Trust - Major defense integrator, good clearance sponsorship path

title: Desktop Support Analyst (Banking)
notes: Onsite role supporting a San Antonio bank - Asks 3 yrs experience OR a bachelors in IT with equivalent practical experience - Active Directory, Windows, M365, Intune, endpoint security

title: Deskside Support Engineer (DOT HQ)
notes: Onsite at Department of Transportation HQ - 75 percent travel between sites, field-tech style end-user support - No clearance to start, must obtain Public Trust - Wide pay band by experience

title: Junior DevOps Engineer
notes: Entry cloud-native role at major cloud infrastructure provider - Kubernetes, load balancers, container registry - 1-2 yrs Linux or DevOps concepts wanted - Cloud+ maps well - Mentored by senior engineers - No clearance

title: Help Desk II
notes: Contract Tier II help desk, partially remote in Austin - Starts part-time 20-30 hrs/week with potential to expand - Windows 10 troubleshooting and ticketing - Resume-building contract while applying to full-time roles

title: Security Operations Center (SOC) Analyst, Junior
notes: STRETCH - Requires active TS/SCI - Otherwise near-perfect entry profile: 0 yrs with BS accepted, SIEM monitoring and incident triage for Army National Guard SOC - Worth applying to get on Peraton recruiter radar

title: SOC Cyber Security Analyst
notes: STRETCH - Needs active Secret at interview and 4+ yrs cyber experience - Explicitly requires Security+ CE which Jalen already holds - Night/weekend shift may reduce applicant competition

title: Network Engineer, Journeyman
notes: STRETCH - Requires active TS/SCI - Army National Guard enterprise network support - NOC monitoring, routing and switching - Security+ explicitly listed as qualifying credential - 2 yrs with BS
